RULING:
DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
The Court made a revision to its tentative ruling. No argument was made and tentative ruling adopted as revised: Defendant Crane Co.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether he was exposed to an asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. Defendant's objection to plaintiff's Exhibit D (one page from an undated catalog) is sustained.
